pkgmetadata.longdescription: parquet-metadata[[Build Status](httpstravis-ci.orgcldellowparquet-metadata.svgbranchmaster)](httpstravis-ci.orgcldellowparquet-metadata)Dump metadata about a Parquet file. You may also be interested in [csv2parquet](httpsgithub.comcldellowcsv2parquet).sudo pip install parquet-metadataparquet-metadata parquet.fileSample outputfilecreated_byparquet-cpp version 1.4.1-SNAPSHOTfilecolumns9filerow_groups1filerows2row_group0size634row_group0rows2row_group0columns9row_group0booltypeBOOLEANrow_group0boolnum_values2row_group0boolcompressionSNAPPYrow_group0boolencodingsPLAIN,RLErow_group0boolcompressed_size36row_group0booluncompressed_size34row_group0boolstatsminFalserow_group0boolstatsmaxTruerow_group0float32typeFLOATrow_group0float32num_values2row_group0float32compressionSNAPPYrow_group0float32encodingsPLAIN_DICTIONARY,PLAIN,RLErow_group0float32compressed_size68row_group0float32uncompressed_size64row_group0float32statsmin0.5row_group0float32statsmax0.6[...]
